case_title: STEPHAN SCHNECK VS. DONALD EARL TAYLOR

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, DONALD EARL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-15-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN PLAINTIFF STEPHAN SCHNECK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DONALD EARL TAYLOR IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2018 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,565.00 FILED BY SCHNECK, STEPHAN AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, DONALD EARL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SCHNECK, STEPHAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHNECK, STEPHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR, DONALD EARL $5,739.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,829.00, FOR MEDICAL BILLS AND PAIN AND SUFFERING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHNECK, STEPHAN AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, DONALD EARL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-25-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, DONALD EARL
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
